notes: Healthcare-luxe is a high-risk luxury vertical. No electric or fluorescent tones in ANY palette field. Background-tier fields (primaryLight, neutral) must be low-chroma even if WCAG passes. Candy pink and aqua-mint must be avoided — they signal mass-market beauty, not luxury aesthetics. The forbidden-zone table in the prompt explicitly bans #C8F078, #A0F060, #7FFFD4 for this vertical.
